title: Nay's Enhanced Caves
description: A Cave Heavily focused Modpack made for fabric 1.20.1
body:
Nay's Enhanced Caves is a modpack fully based arround upgrading the whole Caving experience.

It is the Second Modpack of the "Nay's Enhanced" Series.

It mainly focuses on adding more biomes and ores to caves to improve them.

The main goal is to make the caving Experience feel fresher while also adding new variants of ores to discover.

It also helps newer player by adding more diversity and choice for earlier stuff

It also adds other content to improve vanilla but those are more Quality of Life mods than full on add-ons to the modpack.

Here are some in game screenshots to showcase more of the modpack :

![Nay's Enhanced Caves 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66dba6516b2b7fe8bd56308605ab9ebf2d30f780.jpeg)

![Nay's Enhanced Caves 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18f0194e04d0b2dc80df406dc1b4889b05e9c44d_0.webp)

![Nay's Enhanced Caves 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a30a22da3a75358daec7ebd7b45d357fd175ede5.jpeg)

![Nay's Enhanced Caves 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6802efed271d937a15a2cd99706f6a0353d2b262.jpeg)

![Nay's Enhanced Caves 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/095a60b8689979372e8485710cb7a5d3493bfa4e.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
